description: Per-element font-family (named, generic monospace/sans-serif) with real bold/italic faces; pre/code UA monospace. Assertions use embedded face names: glyph ids in the content streams are not searchable as text.
visual_assertions: The body renders in Georgia (serif) while the h1 is sans-serif.
Bold and italic words use real bold/italic faces, not synthesized strokes.
code, kbd, and pre content renders in a monospace face.
The courier table cell uses Courier New.
